data.content: 1. rollbackBeatState now uses kno rollback with quoted knot IDs, matching the knot description. 2. Added rollback coverage tests that assert kno rollback and note behavior; the focused test file passed. 3. Implementation review is blocked because the full lint sanity gate could not be verified: bun run lint was still running after 60 seconds and had to be terminated, so the knot is returned to ready_for_implementation until lint can be made to pass cleanly in review.
